positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a stylized astronaut floating amidst bioluminescent nebula clouds. The astronaut is rendered in a clean, geometric, high-contrast silhouette, with the suit glowing subtly with internal, electric blue and magenta light sources. Surrounding the astronaut are stylized celestial elements, such as geometric stars, swirling nebulae, and floating crystalline planets, all rendered with deep indigo, cosmic purple, and brilliant teal accents. The composition is centered and balanced, emphasizing the powerful contrast between the dark space background and the vibrant, glowing foreground elements. Art Style: Clean vector illustration meets ethereal cosmic abstractism, suitable for screen printing and apparel graphics. Focus on sharp edges and defined color areas. Lighting: Dramatic, glowing source from the nebula, rim lighting on the astronaut.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, messy, grainy, photographic, photo, cinematic, bokeh, depth of field
